expectations.text: Phases are annotated with sprint numbers
expectations.evidence: No sprint annotations. Plain phase list.

expectations.text: At least one sprint has 2+ parallel phases
expectations.evidence: All 6 phases are strictly sequential: 1->2->3->4->5->6. No parallelism.

expectations.text: Core dashboard UI and a data connector are in an early sprint
expectations.evidence: Dashboard builder is Phase 3 (after auth and connectors). No sprint framing, but it is 3rd of 6 -- mid-project. User can't see anything visual until Phase 3.
No sprints, but billing is Phase 5 of 6 -- clearly not first.

expectations.text: Enterprise features (SSO, audit log) are in later sprints
expectations.evidence: SSO is bundled into Phase 1 'Multi-Tenant Foundation & Authentication' -- the very first phase. This front-loads enterprise complexity.

expectations.text: Frontend and backend work for the same feature appear in the same sprint
expectations.evidence: No sprint grouping. Sequential phases don't enable parallel frontend+backend.
